overview: Pixel Quest is a browser-based mobile-first 2D multiplayer RPG on the ICP blockchain with critical hits, status effects, new monsters, expanded loot, crafting, achievements, party/trade/guild systems, and rich visual polish.
features: Critical hits system with class bonuses and gold damage numbers
New monsters: Forest Spirit, Dark Wisp, Ruins Archer, Kraken Tentacle
Item rarity tiers with animated legendary borders and colored drop bursts
New warrior skills: Battle Cry and Second Wind
New mage skills: Mana Shield and Chain Lightning
Dynamic weather: rain, storm, fog, sandstorm
Quick slots bar for instant item use
Visual polish: death animation, level-up cinematic, ambient life
